label: NRHO cycle start (proxy)
sourceNote: Representative cycle selected from NASA public sample NRHO data (Lee 2019).
description: Beginning of one proxy southern 9:2 NRHO revolution used for archived visualization.

label: Perilune pass (~1,500 km altitude proxy)
sourceNote: Proxy altitude from selected NRHO cycle statistics.
description: Closest-approach segment of representative proxy NRHO cycle.

label: Apolune segment (~69,000 km altitude proxy)
sourceNote: Proxy altitude from selected NRHO cycle statistics.
description: Far-side high-altitude segment of representative proxy NRHO cycle.

label: NRHO cycle end (proxy)
sourceNote: Representative cycle selected from NASA public sample NRHO data (Lee 2019).
description: End of one proxy southern 9:2 NRHO revolution.
